NAME: ENCODE — Data portal update (ENCODE 3)
DESCRIPTION: Major update of the ENCODE data portal supporting ENCODE 3 data, including new data types (ChIP-seq, RNA-seq, WGBS, DNase-seq, Hi-C), improved metadata standards, and the Registry of candidate cis-Regulatory Elements (cCREs) for genome annotation.
TITLE: The Encyclopedia of DNA elements (ENCODE): data portal update
